creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
Hi,

I did a test run for your submission:

- added staging support
- you should only add *one* URL in pkg-descr 

Repository:        https://redports.org/changeset/22519
Port:              sysutils/jail-primer 0.0

      Buildgroup:     10-CURRENT/amd64
      Buildstatus:   SUCCESS
      Log: https://redports.org//~fraenki/20140130140401-36919-173117/jail-primer-0.0.log

      Buildgroup:     9.2-RELEASE/amd64
      Buildstatus:   SUCCESS
      Log: https://redports.org//~fraenki/20140130140401-36919-173118/jail-primer-0.0.log

      Buildgroup:     8.4-RELEASE/amd64
      Buildstatus:   SUCCESS
      Log: https://redports.org//~fraenki/20140130140401-36919-173119/jail-primer-0.0.log

It looks good to me.


Regards
- Frank
